description: Machine-enforceable rules for OpenCode agents. CRITICAL = BLOCK agent. HIGH = FLAG orchestrator. LOW = advisory.

required_mcps.description: MCPs required for the framework to function. Preflight.sh checks these dynamically.

lean-ctx.description: Context persistence — contract storage and retrieval

gitnexus.description: Code intelligence — impact analysis before edits

rules.description: Agent MUST load contract.json before any tool call
rules.message: ⛔ PREFLIGHT FAILED: contract.json not loaded. Run: lean-ctx ctx_knowledge recall --query "orchestration-contract"

rules.description: Agent MUST NOT work on main branch
rules.message: ⛔ PREFLIGHT FAILED: Current branch is main. Create a feature branch first.

rules.description: Agent MUST validate contract.state before proceeding
rules.message: ⛔ STATE FAILED: Contract state is ${actual}. Expected one of: ${expected}

rules.description: Agent MUST run gitnexus_impact before editing any symbol
rules.message: ⛔ IMPACT FAILED: Edit attempted without gitnexus_impact analysis. Run: gitnexus_impact({target, direction: "upstream"})

rules.description: Agent MUST persist contract after every delegation/phase change
rules.message: ⚠️ PERSIST WARNING: Contract not persisted after delegation. Run: lean-ctx ctx_knowledge remember category architecture key orchestration-contract value <updated JSON>

rules.description: Scoring MUST be computed after each subagent returns
rules.message: ⚠️ SCORE WARNING: Subagent output not scored. Run scoring pipeline (Tier 1 rules + Tier 2 judge)

rules.description: Agent MUST follow writing order: Port → Service → Mapper → Adapter → Constants → Events → Tests
rules.message: ⚠️ WRITING ORDER: Files created in wrong order. Expected order: port → service → mapper → adapter → constants → events → tests

rules.description: Agent MUST push feature branch before significant work
rules.message: ⚠️ BRANCH WARNING: Feature branch exists but not pushed. Run: git push -u origin $(git branch --show-current)

rules.description: Learner agent MUST update ALL 11 memory systems in post-flight matrix
rules.message: ⚠️ LEARNER WARNING: Not all memory systems updated. See AGENTS.md §1.7 for full matrix.

rules.description: Tier 2 LLM judge MUST use the canonical judge prompt from rules.json scoring.tier2.judge_prompt or templates/judge-prompt.md
rules.message: ⚠️ SCORE WARNING: Judge prompt must use canonical source. See .opencode/rules/rules.json scoring.tier2.judge_prompt

tier2.judge_prompt: You are an impartial judge evaluating an AI agent's output. Score 0-100 based on: (1) Requirements fulfillment 0-40, (2) Governance compliance 0-30, (3) Completeness 0-20, (4) Edge cases and risks 0-10. Return JSON: { score: N, rationale: '...', missing_items: [...] }
